summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ManoBank Admin APIs and Frontend (Iteration 19). All 24 backend tests passed. Fixed missing export in BancoSistema.js. Employee portal and customer dashboard working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/manobank/admin/customers/{id} - Customer detail with accounts, loans, cards
POST /api/manobank/admin/accounts/{id}/deposit - Ingreso en ventanilla (€50 deposit successful)
POST /api/manobank/admin/accounts/{id}/withdraw - Retirada en ventanilla (€25 withdrawal successful)
GET /api/compliance/summary - Resumen compliance (ManoBank S.A., CIF B19427723)
Frontend /manobank - Dashboard cliente requires login (redirects to /login)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: BancoSistema.js was missing 'export default BancoSistema;' statement causing compilation error
Deposit/Withdraw endpoints use JSON body (DepositRequest/WithdrawRequest models) not query params
All admin endpoints properly require authentication via session cookie
Customer test data: cust_78ae3108d778 (María García López) with account acc_27ec7ecfc24c
Account balance updated after deposit/withdraw operations - teller operations working correctly
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test customer María García López
context_for_next_testing_agent: All ManoBank Admin APIs tested and working. Teller operations (deposit/withdraw) use JSON body format. Fixed BancoSistema.js export. Test customer: cust_78ae3108d778 (María García López) with account acc_27ec7ecfc24c. Account balance was modified during testing (+€50 deposit, -€25 withdrawal = net +€25).

fixes_applied.fix: Added 'export default BancoSistema;' at end of file
fixes_applied.impact: Fixed compilation error preventing /banco page from loading
